scripts.build: node scripts/fix-turbopack.js && opennextjs-cloudflare build && node scripts/fix-chunks.js && node scripts/reduce-bundle.js
scripts.build:cf: node scripts/fix-turbopack.js && opennextjs-cloudflare build && node scripts/fix-chunks.js && node scripts/reduce-bundle.js
scripts.preview: node scripts/fix-turbopack.js && opennextjs-cloudflare build --skipNextBuild && node scripts/fix-chunks.js && node scripts/reduce-bundle.js && opennextjs-cloudflare preview
scripts.deploy: node scripts/fix-turbopack.js && opennextjs-cloudflare build --skipNextBuild && node scripts/fix-chunks.js && node scripts/reduce-bundle.js && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
